author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Resolved by adding real-input convenience wrappers: fft_real, ifft_real, fft_real2, fft_realn in ferray-fft/src/complex.rs. These auto-promote a real Array<T, D> to Vec<Complex<T>> and delegate to the generic fft/fft2/fftn entry points, producing the full complex spectrum (use rfft/rfftn for the Hermitian-folded half-spectrum form). Works for both f32 and f64 thanks to the FftFloat trait from #426. Tests: fft_real_ifft_real_roundtrip_f64, fft_real_ifft_real_roundtrip_f32, fft_real_dc_component, fft_real2_roundtrip, fft_realn_3d_roundtrip.
